summary: Feature fully implemented in prior runs (#1426, #1469, #1492, #1510, #1525). Verified: DrummerDetail has relatedArticles state+useEffect+UI (App.js:6441-6959), SSR handler emits ssrLinks as crawler-visible <a href> links (api/meta/[...path].js:1418-1449), albumArticles.js has relatedDrummerSlug for 27 unique drummer slugs (>5 required). Quality gates: 5+ drummers with articles (top: mario-duplantier 4, igor-cavalera 4, lars-ulrich 3, joey-jordison 3), all links are <a href> in both SSR and React render paths.
title: SEO: Drummer profile pages → related articles internal links — reverse of #1332 (bidirectional PageRank)
